docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY RUIZ, LEO AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PER JUNE 7, 2007, COURT ORDER THE PLAINTIFF MAY APPEAR BY WRITTEN DECLARATION AND SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS COPIED ON THE DEFT. IN THIS CASE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ROBERT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-06-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-09-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 SEE ATTACHED ORDER FOR FURTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS.
PER COURT ORDER, PLAINTIFF'S WRITTEN DECLARATION SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT OF HIS CASE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, LEO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RUIZ, ROBERT THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY WAS NOT GIVEN TO DEFENDANT AS A GIFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
